summary: Final pre-redeploy regression for Chair Economy Expansion Plan ladder (PDF-spec) plus full sanity sweep of legacy chair pricing + admin/treasury endpoints. 15/15 backend tests pass. Frontend landing page renders cleanly with all new ChairExpansionPlan testids + extended TokenRoadmap milestones. No regressions detected. Safe to redeploy.
critical_code_review_comments: services/chair_expansion.py supply math has a quirk: tier 1 supply = high - low + 0 = 50000, every other tier supply = high - low + 1 = 50000. This produces identical supply per tier (50K) and hits the user-spec total $16.25M revenue exactly, so the result is correct, but the inline ternary `(1 if t['order'] > 1 else 0)` is non-obvious — worth a docstring note that tier 1 starts at 0 (inclusive of seat 0) while later tiers start at low+1 to avoid double-counting boundary chairs.

ChairExpansionPlan.tsx polls /api/chairs/expansion-plan only once on mount (no interval). That's intentional for a roadmap section, but if the user later wants the 'current tier' badge to flip live as Genesis fills up, add a 60s interval (mirror TokenRoadmap pattern).
Frontend uses CSS `uppercase` on the status badge, so rendered text is 'NOW SELLING' / 'UPCOMING'. Future Playwright tests should case-insensitive match (small note for next test agent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: ChairExpansionPlan section on landing renders 10 tiers with testids chair-tier-1..10 and ladder data-testid chair-tier-ladder. Tier-1 active state uses CSS-uppercase text 'Now Selling'; Playwright inner_text returns 'NOW SELLING' due to text-transform — match case-insensitively. Backend endpoint /api/chairs/expansion-plan is public, no auth. Legacy /api/chairs/phase + /api/chairs/checkout untouched and still gate as before. Console error 'TypeError: e is not a function' from minified bundle.js is PRE-EXISTING (visible in iteration_jan_2026_perf_alert_qr_sdk too) — not caused by this change, not blocking. Treasury panel + admin cards weren't re-tested via UI but all underlying admin endpoints (squads-status, squads-rpc, perf-alert/status+test, perf-snapshot, vault-auth, solana-indexer sweep-balance/instructions) returned 200/expected — no regressions on the admin surface.
frontend_verified_testids: DOM order: ChairExpansionPlan precedes TokenRoadmap as required
Phantom Connect button present in nav
